---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the pain point. What are you trying to do that fsvlm currently makes hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What would you like fsvlm to do? Be concrete — a CLI flag, a new reader, a new baseline, an improved UI, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Are there workarounds today? Other tools that solve this differently?

## Scope check

Please confirm the request fits fsvlm's scope (see `POSITIONING.md` for what the project is and is not):

- [ ] Related to VLM few-shot fine-tuning, anomaly detection, or the benchmark pipeline
- [ ] Not aerial, drone, wind, solar, or utility-infrastructure imagery (out of project scope)
- [ ] Not medical imaging (regulated domain, out of project scope)

If your use case is out of scope, please open it as a discussion instead — we may be able to point you at a better-fit tool.

## Would you contribute this yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I can test a draft
- [ ] I'd rather just describe the need
